basic_details.job_title: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Coordinator (PCO) and Accountant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026: Pudukkottai District has released the official notification for Project Coordinator (PCO) and Accountant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Coordinator (PCO): MSW/MA (Sociology)/MSC (Psychology) (Computer Knowledge Must) Accountant: B.Com/M.Com (Computer Knowledge Tally Must)

salary_details.details: Project Coordinator (PCO): Rs. 12500/- + TA 1000/- Accountant: Rs. 10000/- + TA 1500/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Pudukkottai District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pudukkottai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Project Coordinator (PCO) and Accountant. There is one vacancy for each post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Project Coordinator (PCO) post, candidates must have a qualification of MSW/MA (Sociology)/MSC (Psychology) and must possess computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: For the Accountant post, candidates must have a B.Com/M.Com degree and must have knowledge of Tally software.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Coordinator (PCO) post is Rs. 12500/- per month, along with a Travel Allowance (TA) of Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Accountant post is Rs. 10000/- per month, along with a Travel Allowance (TA) of Rs. 1500/-.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates should download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for both Project Coordinator and Accountant posts is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Pudukkottai District. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
